metadata.title: 10XAI  Custom AI Operating Systems for SMBs
metadata.description: Custom AI agents that run your sales, support, and operations. Built around your business, not a generic template. Trilingual: English, Portugus, Espaol.

home.eyebrow: AI Tailored to Your Business  Built to Run
home.subhead: We sit with you, learn what's actually slowing you down, and ship the AI Operating System that runs it for you  not another tool you have to learn.
home.credentialsLineEnd: in revenue technology and frontier AI experts.
home.fomoLine: Most SMBs will choose their AI partner in the next 18 months. Choose right the first time.

01.title: Sit with you.
01.body: Discovery isn't a slide deck. We sit with the operator, watch the workflow, and find the friction that's eating the most of your week.

02.title: Build for you.
02.body: We design the AI agents around your actual operations, not a generic template. Your tone of voice. Your CRM. Your stack.

03.title: Ship it running.
03.body: We don't hand you a tool you have to learn. We ship the system already running  measured, monitored, and yours to evolve.

enginesPreview.subhead: Each engine ships running, not as a tool you have to learn. Pick the one your business is feeling friction in. Stack them when you're ready. Hover for details.

ctaBand.title: Pilot purgatory ends here.
ctaBand.subhead: 77% of SMBs that buy AI tools abandon them in six months. We don't sell tools. We deliver running operating systems that survive year two.

metadata.title: About  Bernardo Medrado, founder of 10XAI
metadata.description: 20+ years in revenue technology. ATD Master Trainer, AA-ISP Accredited, FGV. Trilingual native (EN, PT-BR, ES). Why 10XAI exists, and who's behind it.

about.headlineLine1: I spent 20 years inside revenue technology
about.headlineLine2: so my SMB clients don't have to.
about.subhead: Bernardo Medrado  founder of 10XAI. Operator. Trainer. Trilingual native. Two decades in B2B SaaS, healthcare, and medtech, now building AI Operating Systems for businesses that can't afford a 12-person team.

story.title: Why 10XAI exists.
story.p1: I spent two decades building and scaling revenue teams across healthcare, medtech, and B2B technology. I led inside-sales orgs, designed enablement programs that shipped to thousands of reps, and watched what happens when great strategy meets bad operational follow-through.
story.p2start: Then AI showed up  and suddenly every SMB on the planet was being sold a chatbot, a copilot, a productivity tool. Most of them bought one.
story.p2bold: 77% abandon AI tools within six months.
story.p2end: Not because the AI is bad. Because the tools were never wired into how the business actually runs.
story.p3: 10XAI exists for the operators stuck in pilot purgatory. We don't sell tools. We sit with you, learn what's actually slowing you down, and ship the AI Operating System that runs it for you  in English, Portuguese, or Spanish, depending on who's using it.

credentials.title: Trust signals that don't need an employer name.
credentials.subhead: Every credential here is independent of any specific company  earned, accredited, and verifiable. The standard for trust in a 10XAI engagement.

atdMaster.title: ATD Master Trainer
atdMaster.detail: Association for Talent Development  the gold standard for instructional design and training methodology.

atdInstructional.title: ATD Instructional Design Certificate
atdInstructional.detail: Advanced certification in role-based learning architecture and adult-learning theory.

aaIsp.title: AA-ISP Accredited Inside Sales Management
aaIsp.detail: American Association of Inside Sales Professionals  modern revenue-team operating practices.

fgv.title: FGV  Fundao Getulio Vargas
fgv.detail: Brazil's #1 business school. Foundational training in management and operations.

top100.title: Top 100 Most Influential in Healthcare
top100.detail: Public recognition in Brazilian healthcare sector  external validation that pre-dates 10XAI.

languages.title: Trilingual native. Not translated.
languages.subhead: Discovery conversations, deliverables, founder presence  all happen in the language your business actually thinks in.

connect.title: Let's skip the marketing copy.
connect.subhead: Book a 15-minute call. We'll talk about what's actually slowing you down, and whether one of the engines fits  or doesn't.
connect.location: Apex / Raleigh, North Carolina  Serving US + Brasil + Latin America

metadata.title: Methodology  How 10XAI delivers running AI systems
metadata.description: From pilot purgatory to production AI. Discovery-led, week-by-week deliverables, measurement on day one. The 10XAI 4-week protocol.

methodology.subhead: The 4-week protocol that gets your operators out of strategy decks and into running systems. Measured on day one. Tuned on day twenty-eight. Yours from day twenty-nine.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We sit with the operator. Watch the workflow. Find the friction. Capture the baseline metrics so week 4 has something to measure against.
deliverables: Baseline metrics captured (response time, conversion, throughput  whatever matters)
ICP, brand voice, and integration map confirmed

build.title: Build
build.body: We build the AI agents around your actual operations. Your tone of voice. Your CRM. Your stack. Not a generic template. Iterate fast with you in the loop.
deliverables: AI agent(s) trained on your knowledge base
Compliance + escalation rules captured in code
Internal QA across all three languages where relevant

ship.title: Ship
ship.body: Launch the system into production with monitoring on day one. Operator dashboards live. Real conversations, real bookings, real outputs  not a demo.
deliverables: Production deployment with monitoring in place
Operator training on the live system (1:1, recorded)
Real-time alerting on quality, drift, escalation

measure.title: Measure & adopt
measure.body: Compare week 1 baseline to week 4 lift. Tune what's not landing. Hand the operator the keys with documentation and a 30-day support window.
deliverables: Roadmap for month 23 if expanding to other engines

qualityBar.title: What we ship. What we don't.
ships: Measurable lift on a metric you defined
Documentation an operator can hand to their successor
Compliance baked in from day one
skips: Tools you have to learn before they help
Whatever else is wasting your time

cta.title: Ready to start week 1?
cta.subhead: 15 minutes on the phone tells us whether one of the engines fits  or doesn't. No deck. No commitment. Honest answer either way.

metadata.title: Engines  Six AI Operating Systems for SMBs
metadata.description: Lighthouse, Sales, Care, Reach, Mind, Bid + Bernie  the seven engines that run AI operations for small and mid-sized businesses.

enginesIndex.subhead: Each engine ships running, not as a tool you have to learn. Pick the one your business is feeling friction in. Stack them when you're ready. Hover any card for what you get + who it's for.

cta.title: Not sure which one fits?
cta.subhead: Tell Bernie what's eating the most of your week  he'll point you at the right engine and book a 15-minute call to confirm.

metadata.title: Lighthouse Live Demo  10XAI
metadata.description: Paste any local business URL. Watch us build them a website in 60 seconds.

lighthouseDemo.headlineLine2: Watch us build them a website.
lighthouseDemo.subhead: This is the same pipeline we run on prospects every week. Reviews go in. A site goes out. Then we reach out and close it.

input.label: Google Business URL or website
input.disclaimer: Demo mode  generates a templated preview. The real Lighthouse pipeline pulls Google Business Profile data, customer reviews, and photos via Claude vision.

preview.preamble: Below is the site we'd ship to
preview.preambleEnd: . In a real engagement, it goes live on a preview URL within 60 seconds  and we send the owner a personalized loom of it the same hour.
preview.mockHeroSubhead: Trusted by neighbors. Ranked top in {city} on Google with a 4.9-star average across 47 reviews.
preview.ctaTitle: This is the demo. The real one ships in 60 seconds.
preview.ctaSubhead: Lighthouse pulls live data, generates the actual site copy from real reviews, and stages a preview URL ready to deploy under your domain. From $497 setup + $49/mo.
